name: Vena Solutions
tagline: AI-powered FP&A platform with Vena Copilot for forecasting and reporting
description: Vena Solutions is an FP&A platform featuring Vena Copilot, an AI assistant designed for finance teams to support forecasting, reporting, and planning workflows. The platform brings in data from QuickBooks, Xero, and Sage, allowing teams to manage intercompany eliminations, currency conversions, and compliance requirements from one place.
pros: AI Copilot for natural language queries
